ABOUT
{{Underline|49BCFF}}{{Underline|49BCFF}} {{Blurimage|file=Tezo's Base.png|caption=The Tv Corner of Gouache Club.|align=right}} Tezo's Art Supplies is a small population of creatives within the Backrooms, seeking to continue their endeavors in developing media and resources. The total group population climbs up very slowly over the time of its existence, with the current number of confirmed, non-collaborative members being 106. Tezo's Art Supplies as a whole functions secretly, with only accepted members and certain alliances allowed permission to enter their only base. This base, affectionately titled ''Gouache Club'', covers roughly 10 square kilometers of [[Level 114]] and houses 83 members alongside 21 collaborators. Hanging signs of the group's logo can be seen as one reaches within 50 meters of the base, indicating their proximity. In most cases, those who appear in Level 114 will be roughly 300 meters away from Gouache Club. No other bases have been established beyond small market posts in other levels, often manned by 1 to 3 members. Most notably, Tezo's Art Supplies creates art products and supplies, with many of them having some sort of anomalous quality to them. This idea appears to have been brought on largely because of Ethel Tezo, the founder of the group and a metaphysical engineer popular within Backrooms society between 1294 until her death in 1313. With her initial popularity, Tezo's lived on, and would organize into Tezo's Art Supplies early 1316, with the practice of artistic thaumaturgy as its focus.

HIERARCHY
{{Underline|49BCFF}}{{Underline|49BCFF}}
[[File:JeffTheJillerProfilePicture.png|thumb|right|250px|@JeffTheJiller's profile picture]]
SAVANT
{{Underline|49BCFF}} The acting leader of Tezo's Art Supplies is known as the Savant, and holds the duty to keep up treaties and alliances with other parties. While internal affairs may be needed, those are often managed by existing members. Beyond this, the Savant often takes the role of leading advisor for all things developed by the group. They also handle later guidance to newer members on how to use the metaphysical and transmutational tools passed down through the group. The current savant is Helena "Jill" Kiena, known online as JeffTheJiller, who was voted in April 25th 20XX for her second term as the Savant. The Savant position lasts 3 years with each one able to run for 3 terms, consecutvive or not. In the case of possible corruption, the Savant can be booted out of their position with a 2/3rd vote by the Onsite Expert Commitee, and they will act as a collective ruler to preseve normalcy until the next election cycle. During said election cycle, they also take the responsibility of running the group if voting takes too long.
ONSITE EXPERT COMMITEE
{{Underline|49BCFF}} The Onsite Expert Commitee is a collection of Tezo's, Menagerie, Ncipetherazi, Cascadan, and Auriellan upper staff who form in case of issues within the group. Also forming for any issues within [[The Menagerie]], the party preseves normalcy until leadership is reobtained. Depending on the circumstances, this meeting largely consists of those affiliated with Tezos' and Ncipetheraz, though the other groups are free to participate. Translators are often provided at these meetings.
EXPERTS
{{Underline|49BCFF}} Any inhouse issues are often brought to Experts first. Experts are a collective of members picked out by various Savants and serve until they resign or are forced to. Because of the loosness of their electoral position, many smaller markets and bases outside of the main one don't have experts with them. This role is not integeral to the security of Tezo's Art Supplies, but provide help wherever. These members have also been known to help pick out and train new possible members of the group. Provided is an incomplete list of the current experts (as listed by their tags on Backchat): Inku-Tutsu, Froghatter, Katterina, Toftpulf, Deorluv
ARTISTS
{{Underline|49BCFF}} Artists are any other member of Tezo's Art Supplies that does not fit into the other categories. In digital spaces, some of them may have stars by their name to signify them as VIP, but this only exists online. Artists are allowed easy access to any of the main outposts or other markets, and are often the ones creating new products or artwork.
CONTRIBUTORS
{{Underline|49BCFF}} Contributors are ex-members or otherwise people affiliated with Tezo's Art Supplies who are not considered as full members anymore. Outside of not having the ability to vote for Savants, the role is no different from the Artist role.
Partnerships
{{Underline|49BCFF}}{{Underline|49BCFF}} {{Blurimage|file=TezoShop.png|caption=Tezo's largest external base, within Aurielle's main city in [[Level 339]].}} Because of the group's non-violent and friendly ethic, Tezo's remains in largely positive relationships with the majorty of Backrooms. Especially aiding to this is Tezo's outreach programs; which help artists and product developers move their focus into working for specific groups. However, some have tighter connections to the group, often forming through history or other mutually beneficial connections. In exchange for talent and other projects, these alliances help Tezo's continue its programs by providing food and supplies. Ncipetheraz
Formed at the same time as the partnership with The Menagerie, their sustained existence allowed for the three parties to work more closely together. Ncipetheraz became majorly important to Tezo's Art Supplies during times of disarray in the party, as the Ncipetherazi Council would help the group recover after the Great Pause. It is very possible that without support, the group would have fallen apart. Republic of Aurielle
Aurielle and Tezo's history is significantly shorter in comparison to others but is nonetheless equally important; Aurielle's presence near many of Tezo's bases is not out of coincidence. Experienced Auriellen architects and survivalists helped Tezo's difficult relocation to Level 114, which killed 28 members—survivors remain certain that without Auriellen assistance many more would have died. Furthermore, the Treaty of Friendship and Mutual Cooperation signed in 2019 between the two groups led to Aurielle acting as the main source of military defense for Tezos. Aurielle also assists Tezos through art internship programs for students and job opportunities. On the opposite end, some groups, while still retaining a non-violent agreement with Tezo's Art Supplies, have consistently opposed the organization. In extreme cases, the two parties have tried to take each other down in a political sense. Within Tezo's current outreach program, these groups are blacklisted from getting members to assist them. Atrego
Discourse between the two parties often revolves around art as a subject, rather than a conflict of power or influence. The different views on the medium has left Atrego to be very critical of Tezo's as a whole. Their antagonism doesn't reach much further than this, however, as both parties have shown willingness to cooperate.
